3. Now combine the Rasi and the planet. Aries·Mesha is ruled by
Mars.. In it there are 2Y. stars. First is Aswini, ruled by Ketu. The
second is Bharani governed by venus. The third is Karthik.ai, lord of
which is Sun. Hence, according to Krishnamurti Padhati, suppose
the meridian falls between 20.6'40M and 21.53"20~ then this area
is in the sign Aries owned by Mars.
